title: Free Mullets??? Fritos® Gets Fans Flow Ready
text: Fritos, Official Snack Sponsor of the USA Mullet Championship, giving away 1,000 free mullet haircuts at all Floyd's 99 Barbershop locations and chance to win $10,000 PLANO, Texas , Aug. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- This August, in celebration of the USA Mullet Championships, Fritos®, the "Down for Everything™" corn chip from Frito-Lay®, is fueling fans' passion for the iconic hairstyle by offering 1,000 free mullet cuts in August, while supplies last. "People express themselves with their hair, and since we're seeing this tremendous resurgence of the mullet hairstyle, we're excited to help people embrace their individuality by making it easier than ever to rock this epic look while enjoying an iconic snack like Fritos," said Tina Mahal, senior vice president of brand marketing at Frito-Lay.

title: Time To Go Defensive With These ETFs

title: SodaStream and Enlight Sign Agreement For the Supply of Renewable Energy
text: The 15-year agreement will enable SodaStream to transition to 100% renewable energy by the beginning of 2024 at all of its global production sites in Israel. KFAR SABA, Israel , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As the world's leading sparkling water brand and a subsidiary of PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP), SodaStream has entered into a corporate power purchase agreement ("PPA") with Enlight Renewable Energy (NASDAQ: ENLT, TASE: ENLT), a leading global renewable energy platform.
